evals.expected_output: The llms.txt file at ai.symfony.com/public/llms.txt is regenerated with all current components, bridges, docs, and cookbook entries. A summary of changes is shown.

evals.prompt: we just added a new platform bridge, can you refresh the llms.txt to pick it up
evals.expected_output: The skill scans src/platform/src/Bridge/ and updates the Supported AI Platforms section. The new bridge appears in the list. Other sections remain correct.

evals.prompt: sync the llms.txt file with the current state of the repo
evals.expected_output: Full regeneration of llms.txt. All sections reflect current codebase: components from src/, platform bridges, store bridges, docs pages, cookbook entries. Structure follows the llms.txt convention.
